推荐场景: 朋友聚会后对话｜综合拒绝、边界、误会、支持、修复
60秒任务: 「深度社交 Boss」：拒绝/边界/误会修复；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 委婉表达｜误会修复｜情绪支持｜边界｜关系维护｜隐含意图
场景族: 朋友聚会｜家庭客厅｜餐桌｜派对｜聊天场景
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
I can understand both sides here.（平衡双方）
The real issue seems to be ___.（识别核心问题）
I’m not saying ___; I’m saying ___.（区分立场）
Can we separate the facts from the feelings?（拆分事实与情绪）
That may be true, but the timing matters.（指出时机）
I don’t want anyone to feel pressured.（保护关系）
Let’s check what each person actually needs.（确认需求）
Maybe we can find a middle ground.（寻求折中）
It sounds like there are two concerns.（归纳分歧）
Before we decide, can we clear up ___?（决策前澄清）
I appreciate the honesty, even if it’s hard.（认可坦诚）
Let’s not turn this into blame.（避免指责）
What would feel fair to everyone?（寻找公平）
I’m willing to compromise on ___.（提出让步）
Can we leave this conversation in a better place?（关系收尾）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: tension, boundary, intention, pressure, misunderstanding, compromise, fairness, trust
Verbs: clarify, respect, compromise, decide, repair, listen, balance, support
Adjectives / Tone: fair, honest, awkward, sensitive, reasonable, pressured, misunderstood
Time / Place: at dinner, during the party, in the group chat, later, in private
Chunks: middle ground, both sides, real issue, clear up, separate facts from feelings, better place
